scripts.help:
echo '
Track Your Regions - Available Commands
========================================

General:
  help                     Show this help
  build                    Build backend + frontend
  lint                     Lint backend + frontend
  lint:fix                 Lint and auto-fix backend + frontend
  typecheck                Type check backend + frontend
  check                    Comprehensive gate: lint + typecheck (Node + Python) + fast security + knip + lint:extra. Used in CI.
  knip                     Find unused files + dependencies
  knip:full                Full knip scan (includes exports/types)
  lint:circular            madge: find circular ts/tsx imports
  lint:shell               shellcheck on scripts/*.sh (Docker)
  lint:docker              hadolint on every Dockerfile (Docker)
  lint:extra               composite: lint:circular + lint:shell + lint:docker

Python (cv-python):
  setup:py:dev             First-time setup: create cv-python/.venv and install all deps + dev tools
  lint:py                  Ruff lint cv-python
  lint:py:fix              Ruff lint + auto-fix
  format:py                Ruff format check
  format:py:fix            Ruff format apply
  typecheck:py             mypy on cv-python/app
  check:py                 lint:py + format:py + typecheck:py
  test:py                  pytest with coverage

Development:
  setup                    First-run: create .env + admin account (run once)
  dev                      Start all services (Docker)
  dev:stop                 Stop all services (Docker)
  dev:rebuild              Rebuild and restart all services
  dev:restart              Stop, rebuild, and start all services
  dev:backend              Start backend only (local, no Docker)
  dev:backend:stop         Stop backend container
  dev:backend:rebuild      Rebuild and restart backend container
  dev:backend:restart      Stop, rebuild, start backend
  dev:frontend             Start frontend only (local, no Docker)
  dev:frontend:stop        Stop frontend container
  dev:frontend:rebuild     Rebuild and restart frontend container
  dev:frontend:restart     Stop, rebuild, start frontend

Testing:
  test                     Run backend + frontend unit/integration tests
  test:fast                Alias of test
  test:coverage            Run backend + frontend coverage
  test:e2e:smoke           Run Playwright smoke E2E
  test:e2e:full            Run Playwright full E2E
  test:py                  Run cv-python pytest with coverage

Logs (follow mode):
  logs                     All services
  logs:backend             Backend only
  logs:frontend            Frontend only
  logs:db                  Database only
  logs:martin              Martin only

Database:
  db:up                    Start PostgreSQL container
  db:down                  Stop PostgreSQL container
  db:create [name]         Create new database and switch to it
  db:list                  List all databases
  db:use <name>            Switch to a database (restarts Martin)
  db:drop <name>           Drop a database (not golden)
  db:status                Show current DB info
  db:shell                 Open psql shell
  db:load-gadm             Load GADM data (~30 min)
  db:dump [file]           Dump DB to file
  db:restore file          Restore DB from dump
  db:run-sql               Run SQL from stdin (pipe a .sql file)
  db:make-admin <email>    Grant admin role to a user
  db:mark-golden           Protect current DB from deletion
  db:unmark-golden         Remove golden protection

Martin:
  martin                   Start Martin standalone (reads active DB)
  martin:restart           Restart Martin Docker container
  martin:stop              Stop Martin container
  martin:logs              Follow Martin logs

Security:
  security:scan            Semgrep SAST scan (Node, via Docker)
  security:deps            npm audit for backend + frontend
  security:py:bandit       Python SAST (Bandit) on cv-python/app
  security:py:semgrep      Semgrep SAST scan (Python, via Docker)
  security:py:deps         pip-audit for cv-python/requirements.txt
  security:py:all          Run all Python security scans
  security:image           Build cv-python image and run Trivy CVE scan
  security:all             check + slow Semgrep (Node+Python) + Trivy image scan

Codebase Export:
  repomix                  Pack codebase into AI-friendly XML file

Tip:
  npm run                  Show all script names from package.json
'
scripts.predev: test -f .env || echo 'No .env found - run: npm run setup (continuing with built-in compose defaults)'
scripts.dev:restart: docker compose down && docker compose up --build
scripts.dev:backend:restart: docker compose stop backend && docker compose up -d --build backend
scripts.dev:frontend:restart: docker compose stop frontend && docker compose up -d --build frontend
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm --prefix backend run lint:fix && npm --prefix frontend run lint:fix
scripts.lint:circular: npx --yes madge@8.0.0 --extensions ts,tsx --circular backend/src && npx --yes madge@8.0.0 --extensions ts,tsx --circular frontend/src
scripts.lint:docker: docker run --rm -i hadolint/hadolint:v2.14.0 < backend/Dockerfile && docker run --rm -i hadolint/hadolint:v2.14.0 < frontend/Dockerfile && docker run --rm -i hadolint/hadolint:v2.14.0 < frontend/Dockerfile.e2e && docker run --rm -i hadolint/hadolint:v2.14.0 < cv-python/Dockerfile && docker run --rm -i hadolint/hadolint:v2.14.0 < db/Dockerfile
scripts.lint:extra: npm run lint:circular && npm run lint:shell && npm run lint:docker
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
scripts.setup:py:dev: cd cv-python && python3.12 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt
scripts.check:py: npm run lint:py && npm run format:py && npm run typecheck:py
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run check:py && npm run security:py:bandit && npm run security:py:deps && npm run security:deps && npm run knip && npm run lint:extra
scripts.knip: npm --prefix backend run knip && npm --prefix frontend run knip
scripts.knip:full: npm --prefix backend run knip:full && npm --prefix frontend run knip:full
scripts.db:run-sql: docker compose exec -T db psql -U postgres -d $(cat .active-db 2>/dev/null || echo track_regions)
scripts.security:scan: docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/src:z" semgrep/semgrep semgrep scan --config p/owasp-top-ten --config p/nodejs --config p/react --config p/secrets --error
scripts.security:deps: cd backend && npm audit --audit-level=moderate --omit=dev && cd ../frontend && npm audit --audit-level=moderate --omit=dev
scripts.security:py:semgrep: docker run --rm -v "${PWD}/cv-python:/src:z" semgrep/semgrep semgrep scan --config p/python --config p/owasp-top-ten --config p/secrets --error
scripts.security:py:all: npm run security:py:bandit && npm run security:py:semgrep && npm run security:py:deps
scripts.security:image: docker build -t track-your-regions/cv-python:scan ./cv-python && docker run --rm aquasec/trivy:0.70.0 image --severity HIGH,CRITICAL --exit-code 1 track-your-regions/cv-python:scan
scripts.security:all: npm run check && npm run security:scan && npm run security:py:semgrep && npm run security:image
